name: French Onion Soup Gratinee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt butter in hot.
2. Cook onions and sugar for 10 minutes until onions are caramelized.
3. Stir in flour until well blended with the onions and pan juices.
4. Add water, wine, and undiluted beef broth; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Cut four 1-inch thick slices of bread from loaf.
7. Toast bread slices in a 325°F oven until lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
8. Ladle soup into 4 oven-safe bowls and place one slice toasted bread on the surface of each bowl.
9. Fold Swiss cheese slices over the bread; arrange onto the cheese slices in each bowl.
10. Place soup bowls back into the pan for easier handling. Bake in a 425°F oven until cheese is melted, about 10 minutes.
